description_long: This is a medium-sized corrugated cardboard shipping box, featuring brown kraft paper with visible corrugation texture. The front side displays bold black stenciled text reading 'THIS SIDE UP' with two upward arrows, indicating proper orientation for handling. One side has a large torn hole, revealing a black-and-white printed image of a person and some interior contents. Another side shows a USPS Priority Mail shipping label, partially obscured but clearly indicating its use for postal delivery. The top is sealed with a wide strip of gray packing tape running lengthwise, and faint printed graphics are visible on the upper surfaces. The box shows signs of wear, including a smudge and the torn section, suggesting it has been handled and possibly mishandled during transit.
description: A brown corrugated cardboard shipping box with 'THIS SIDE UP' markings, a USPS label, and a torn side revealing interior contents. The box is sealed with gray tape and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows 'THIS SIDE UP' text with arrows and the main tape seal.
description_view_1: Side view displays a smudge and vertical text, with no major openings.
description_view_2: Rear view features a USPS Priority Mail shipping label and the tape seal.
description_view_3: Side view reveals a large torn hole exposing interior contents and a black-and-white image.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, shipping area, or stacked with other boxes
